creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
the /usr/share/doc/ntp HTML documentation is missing the "pic"
subdirectory thereof and the images within it.  this makes browsing these
docs have broken images.

Fix: 

Don't know; /usr/src/contrib/ntp/html doesn't contain these files either.
How-To-Repeat: 
	

open browser to file://usr/share/doc/ntp/index.htm and see what happens.
